title: More Adobe
description: More Adobe Mod is simple decoration mod.
body:
![2023-07-26 154248.png](https://s2.loli.net/2023/07/26/1MYifazmCXKhZRJ.png)
#### More Adobe Mod is simple decoration mod.

#### More Adobe for 1.14+ requires Fabric Loader, Fabric API. 

#### Discord Link: https://discord.gg/pDaMyHDfBy

 

#### Adobe Block

Add more adobe block like photoshop, premier pro etc.

Recipes is simple. Use a brick item and a dye(any) can craft one species adobe block.


![2023-07-26 155843.png](https://s2.loli.net/2023/07/26/NKlFfvUXeaLOHQr.png)






You can use adobes decorate your house,world and anything.
 

#### About Minecraft Forge
#### May we will compatibility the FORGE soon.

#### For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
